body: {"query":"query GetLanguageWords($languageCode: String!, $category: String!, $difficulty: String!, $count: Int!) { getLanguageWords(languageCode: $languageCode, category: $category, difficulty: $difficulty, count: $count) { id word pronunciation correctImageUrl distractorImages category } }","variables":{"languageCode":"es","category":"animals","difficulty":"beginner","count":5},"operationName":"GetLanguageWords"}
